full_script:
[BEAT 1]
Bhai, mother's day ke baare mein suno. Yeh game-changer hai legit. Most log isko ignore karte hain.

[BEAT 2]
Maine isko test kiya — results dekho. mother's day se poora workflow automate ho gaya. 10 min mein.

[BEAT 3]
Ab dekho results — views 3x, time 50% saved. Yeh proof hai, theory nahi.

[CTA]
AI comment karo — main full breakdown bhej dunga. Save karo baad ke liye! 🔥
